Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class PresenceUserConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.PresenceUserConfig
public class PresenceUserConfig extends Metadata

Java class for PresenceUserConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PresenceUserConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="assignments" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PresenceConfigAssignments" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="capacity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="declineReasons" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAutoAccept" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDecline" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDeclineReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDisconnectSound" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRequestSound" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="presenceStatusOnDecline" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="presenceStatusOnPushTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getDeclineReasons

      public List<String> getDeclineReasons()
      Gets the value of the declineReasons property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the declineReasons property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDeclineReasons().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the declineReasons property.
